description_long: This is a compact, rectangular electronic keyboard with a vibrant blue casing and a set of black and white piano-style keys. The keyboard features a row of 16 square, white control pads above the keys, likely for triggering samples or effects. To the left of the pads, there are two vertical sliders and two small round buttons, which are typically used for volume, pitch, or modulation control. The surface is smooth and glossy, with the brand name 'B-render' printed on the top right corner. The overall design is modern and streamlined, with all controls and keys easily accessible from the front. The keyboard appears lightweight and portable, suitable for use in urban environments such as street performances, music studios, or community centers.
description: A compact blue electronic keyboard with black and white keys, 16 white control pads, and two sliders, featuring a modern, glossy finish.
description_view_0: Front angled view showing the full set of keys, control pads, and sliders, emphasizing the depth and layout of the controls.
description_view_1: Top-down view highlighting the arrangement of the keys, pads, and sliders, with the 'B-render' logo visible.
description_view_2: Side view focusing on the slim profile and the alignment of the keys and pads.
description_view_3: Direct front view displaying the full keyboard, pads, and sliders, providing a clear look at the interactive elements.
